title: Surcouf
writer: Henri Charles Chivot, Alfred Duru, Arthur Bernède
actors: Jean Angelo, María Dalbaicín, Thomy Bourdelle
plot: Tells a romanticized version of the life story of Robert Surcouf, a French privateer and slave trader who operated in the Indian Ocean from the end of the 18th century to the beginning of the 19th century.
